title: Suddenly, Egyptian Gods / Suddenly, Anubis
overview: This is sudden, but welcome to the world of Egyptian gods, where ancient deities work, have fun, and relax like the rest of us.

title: Suddenly, Arriving / Suddenly Bastet
overview: Get ready to meet the cat goddess Bastet.

title: Suddenly, a Day Off / Suddenly, Thoth
overview: Anubis and Thoth enjoy a day off from work, and we get to see just what makes Thoth a god of wisdom.

title: Suddenly, Horus and Set / Suddenly, Bad Blood
overview: Set and Horus are rival deities, but for all his scheming, Set seems to have trouble getting the edge over his falcon-headed foe.

title: Suddenly, Ra and Apep / Suddenly, Presents
overview: The father of the Egyptian pantheon, Ra, is headed back home after another long trip abroad... but first he'll have to get past the chaos-spewing serpent, Apep.

title: Suddenly, Magical Thoth and Phantom Thief Set
overview: Suddenly, Set is a phantom thief who has stolen a rare gem, with ace detective Horus on his tail!

title: Suddenly, Kotatsu / Suddenly, Medjed
overview: As the Egyptian gods try to stay toasty during the cold months, we get a look at the enigmatic deity known as Medjed.

title: Suddenly, an Idol / Suddenly, Pottery
overview: Anubis and the gang enjoy a concert put on by the serpentine idol Sata, before taking in a pottery class from the stern but passionate Khnum.

title: Suddenly, Rice Paddies / Suddenly, Swinging
overview: Anubis and the gang attempt to cultivate some tasty rice, but things are going rough until Wenet steps in to help. Afterwards, the Egyptian gods have some fun on the swings of a local park.

title: Suddenly, a Banquet
overview: It's time for the biggest meeting of the year, and all the Egyptian gods are busy setting things up.

title: Suddenly, Welcoming Back the Egyptian Gods
overview: Sudden though it may be, Anubis, Thoth, and the whole pantheon of Egyptian gods are back for more adventures.

title: Suddenly, Hinamatsuri
overview: The Egyptian gods decide to celebrate the Japanese holiday of Hinamatsuri, but Horus and Set find themselves disagreeing over a few points.

title: Suddenly, A Magical Return
overview: After ace detective Horus tries to prevent a daring heist, the master of mystic arcs, Magical Thoth, returns!

title: Suddenly, A Late Night Snack
overview: When Bastet misses out on a pizza run due to her nocturnal lifestyle, she turns to Wenet for help with a midnight snack.

title: Suddenly, Help From Otter
overview: The spotlight shines on the humble and helpful Otter, who might be the glue holding this particular pantheon together.

title: Suddenly, A Strategy Meeting
overview: Apep holds a meeting to help figure out how exactly he can finally outdo Ra.

title: Suddenly, Sobek
overview: The crocodile-faced Sobek might be a powerful and fierce-looking Egyptian deity, but all he really wants is to make friends.

title: Suddenly, Bed Head
overview: A rough encounter with his pillow leaves Horus with a case of bedhead that Set won't hesitate to make fun of.

title: Suddenly, A Winter Episode
overview: The Egyptian Gods enjoy a relaxing time--and s'mores--around a campfire.

title: Another Day, Another Sudden Encounter with the Egyptian Gods
overview: The Egyptian Gods go to war... in a snowball battle!
